tests.title: Factory v6 has on-chain bytecode
tests.desc: QryptSafeV6 Factory at 0x04E4d410646a6c5268E003121023111e6328DA59: 869 bytes on Sepolia.

tests.title: Impl v6 has on-chain bytecode
tests.desc: PersonalQryptSafeV6 at 0x9b3F78B4abc41cf2c1C5E85F9c79789d5c99d1ca: 11952 bytes. EIP-1167 clone target.

tests.title: vaultImplementation() matches deployed impl
tests.desc: factory.vaultImplementation() = 0x9b3F78B4abc41cf2c1C5E85F9c79789d5c99d1ca. Matches IMPL_V6 constant.

tests.title: Create Vault C via factory
tests.desc: Vault C already at 0xE75bdF590398CB924c2071c4DB69a345C45E02DD. EIP-1167 clone, chainHead=H100A.

tests.title: Create Vault B via factory
tests.desc: Vault B already at 0x0Edc4e0D8908bAE7eF7Ff9765b9f48cd8d910ba7. Storage isolated from Vault C.

tests.title: commitChain(H100, 100) initializes OTP chain
tests.desc: initialized()=true, owner()=0x60ebF886... H100A set as chainHead via createVault. OTP chain ready.

tests.title: Vault state: chainHead == H100, chainLength == 100
tests.desc: initialized=true, lastActivityBlock=10638444. eth_call confirms active vault with 100-link OTP chain.

tests.title: Approve USDC for Vault C (10 USDC)
tests.desc: Wallet C approved Vault C for 10 USDC via ERC-20 approve().

tests.title: shield() 1 USDC with valid OTP H99
tests.desc: Vault already has 3 qUSDC from prior run.

tests.title: shield() ratchet replay: revert expected
tests.desc: Re-using H99 after consumption reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. Ratchet monotonicity enforced.

tests.title: shield() with wrong OTP: revert expected
tests.desc: Arbitrary bytes32 OTP reverts. keccak256(wrong) != H99. Pre-image never exposed.

tests.title: shield() from non-owner Wallet B: revert expected
tests.desc: Wallet B rejected from Vault C. 'Not vault owner'. onlyOwner enforced on all state-changing functions.

tests.title: shield() amount below 1e6 minimum: revert expected
tests.desc: 100 wei < MINIMUM_SHIELD_AMOUNT (1e6). Reverts 'Amount below minimum'. Dust attack prevention.

tests.title: commitTransfer() with OTP H98
tests.desc: commitHash=keccak256(H98||nonce||token||to||amount) stored on-chain. chainHead stays H99. OTP consumed only at reveal. Event CommitSubmitted.

tests.title: revealTransfer() with no matching commit: revert expected
tests.desc: Unknown nonce produces unknown commitHash. Reverts 'Commit not found'. No reveal-without-commit possible.

tests.title: revealTransfer() with wrong OTP: revert expected
tests.desc: Wrong OTP at reveal reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. Two-layer OTP: once for commit hash, once for chain check.

tests.title: revealTransfer() success: 1 USDC to Wallet B
tests.desc: revealTransfer failed: transaction execution reverted

tests.title: Replay used commitHash: revert expected
tests.desc: Re-using consumed nonce/OTP reverts. Nonce marked used + OTP chain advanced. Double-spend blocked.

tests.title: rotateChainHead(): rechargeChain to new OTP chain
tests.desc: rechargeChain(newHead=H100R, currentProof=cA[96]). New 100-link chain installed. Event ChainRecharged.

tests.title: unshield() 1 USDC back to Wallet C
tests.desc: 1 qUSDC burned, 1 USDC returned to Wallet C. chainHead advances cR[99+1]→cR[99]. Event TokenUnshielded.

tests.title: unshield() over shielded balance: revert expected
tests.desc: Over-withdrawal reverts 'Insufficient shielded balance'. CEI pattern: check before burn. No partial state changes.

tests.title: Create EIP-712 QryptAir voucher: offline
tests.desc: Wallet C signs Voucher off-chain. Domain:{name:'QryptAir',version:'1',chainId:11155111}. ECDSA verify OK. No TX.

tests.title: fundAirBudget(token, 1 USDC, OTP H98R)
tests.desc: 1 qUSDC burned from shieldedBalance, added to airBudget. cR[98] used. Event AirBudgetFunded.

tests.title: air bags == 1 USDC, shieldedBalance isolated
tests.desc: airBudget=1.0 USDC, shieldedBalance=1.0 USDC. Buckets fully isolated. fundAirBudget moves between buckets, not out.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher(): Wallet B redeems 1 USDC
tests.desc: Wallet B redeems voucher. 1 USDC from air bags only. airBudget: 1.0→0.0 USDC. Event AirVoucherRedeemed.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher() replay same nonce: revert
tests.desc: Reused nonce reverts 'Voucher already redeemed'. usedVoucherNonces[nonce]=true. One-time enforcement.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher() expired deadline: revert
tests.desc: Deadline 1h ago < block.timestamp. Reverts 'Voucher expired'. Time-bound protection confirmed.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher() wrong transferCodeHash: revert
tests.desc: Sig signed over wrong hash. ECDSA.recover gives wrong signer. Reverts 'Sig not from vault owner'. Voucher binding enforced.

tests.title: reclaimAirBudget(): air bags returns to shieldedBalance
tests.desc: air bags already reclaimed in prior run. shieldedBalance=1.0 USDC.

tests.title: unshieldToRailgun() wrong OTP: revert
tests.desc: Wrong OTP reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. OTP enforced before any state change in bridge function.

tests.title: unshieldToRailgun() zero railgunProxy: revert
tests.desc: Zero address proxy reverts 'Invalid Railgun proxy'. Prevents accidental token burn.

tests.title: unshieldToRailgun() over balance: revert
tests.desc: Requesting 101.0 USDC over balance 1.0 reverts. CEI pattern enforced.

tests.title: unshieldToRailgun() logic: mock Railgun proxy
tests.desc: 1 qUSDC burned, approve granted+revoked atomically, mock EOA proxy called. Contract logic verified. Full ZK needs Railgun SDK.

tests.title: OTP head advances after bridge call
tests.desc: lastActivityBlock=10638466. chainHead monotonically advanced after unshieldToRailgun. Bridge OTP accounting confirmed.

tests.title: Pre-image resistance: H96 unknown from H97
tests.desc: keccak256(H96A)==H97A (forward trivial). Reverse: find X s.t. keccak256(X)==H97A — infeasible. H96A was visible in T19 calldata but cannot be recomputed from H97A.

tests.title: Ratchet replay: consumed OTP H99A rejected
tests.desc: H99A (used in T09) still rejected. Ratchet is permanently monotonic. Once consumed, link is dead forever.

tests.title: Stale OTP from deeper in chain rejected
tests.desc: cA[50] (deep past, 50+ links behind initial head) rejected. keccak256(cA[50])!=currentHead. Only immediate pre-image accepted.

tests.title: commitChain() double-init: revert
tests.desc: initialize() on active vault reverts 'Already initialized'. notInitialized modifier blocks re-init. OTP chain state immutable once set.

tests.title: commitChain() with zero chainHead: revert
tests.desc: createVault(bytes32(0)) reverts 'Invalid chain head'. Zero-value guard prevents trivially broken chain.

tests.title: commitChain() with chainLength == 0: revert
tests.desc: rechargeChain(bytes32(0), proof) reverts 'Invalid new chain head'. Zero head guard on recharge. Cannot install degenerate chain.

tests.title: Cross-vault OTP: Vault C OTP rejected by Vault B
tests.desc: cA[98] (Vault C's chain) does not satisfy Vault B's chainHead (cB[100]). Vaults fully isolated. Cross-vault OTP reuse blocked.

tests.title: Future OTP not yet in chain: revert
tests.desc: cR[50] (40+ links in the future) rejected. keccak256(cR[50])!=currentHead. Only next sequential link accepted.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher() pulls only from air bags
tests.desc: shieldedBalance=0.0, airBudget=0.0. T25 changed only airBudget. shieldedBalance isolation confirmed.

tests.title: fundAirBudget() with wrong OTP: revert
tests.desc: Wrong OTP on fundAirBudget reverts 'Invalid vault proof'. OTP guards all state-changing operations including air bags funding.

tests.title: fundAirBudget() excess over shieldedBalance: revert
tests.desc: Funding 100.0 USDC over shieldedBalance 0.0 reverts 'Insufficient shielded balance'.

tests.title: reclaimAirBudget() from non-owner: revert
tests.desc: Wallet B cannot reclaim Vault C's air bags. Reverts 'Not vault owner'. onlyOwner enforced. Third-party drain blocked.

tests.title: redeemAirVoucher() with depleted air bags: revert
tests.desc: Voucher for 5.0 USDC > airBudget 0.0 reverts 'Insufficient air budget'. Cannot overspend air bags.

tests.title: Re-initialize already-initialized vault: revert
tests.desc: initialize() on active vault reverts 'Already initialized'. notInitialized modifier prevents storage clobber.

tests.title: emergencyWithdraw() before 1,296,000-block timelock: revert
tests.desc: Emergency withdraw available at block 11934466, current 10638466. ~180 days remaining. Timelock enforced.

tests.title: Any vault function from non-owner Wallet B: revert
tests.desc: All onlyOwner functions reject Wallet B. 'Not vault owner'. Universal access control across all protected functions.
